channel.title: Apple on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Apple on Arrans github.io

item.title: iCHAIT/awesome-macOS
item.description:  A curated list of awesome applications, softwares, tools and shiny things for macOS.

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.title: jaromaz/MacintoshPi
item.description: MacintoshPi is a project that allows running full-screen versions of Apple’s Mac OS 7, Mac OS 8 and Mac OS 9 with sound, active online connection and modem emulation under Raspberry Pi.

item.title: context-labs/mactop
item.description: mactop - Apple Silicon Monitor Top written in pure Golang! Under 1,000 lines of code.

item.title: Apple-Actions/import-codesign-certs
item.description: GitHub Action for Importing Code-signing Certificates into a Keychain

item.title: Apple-Actions/download-provisioning-profiles
item.description: Github Action for downloading provisioning profiles from Apple AppStore Connect
